titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يَقْرَأُ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ قَبْلَ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning what is to be recited in the two Rak’ah before Fajr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي إِذَا أُقِيمَتِ الصَّلاَةُ فَلاَ صَلاَةَ إِلاَّ الْمَكْتُوبَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning: Once the Iqamah has been called, there should be no Prayer except the obligatory one

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ فَاتَتْهُ الرَّكْعَتَانِ قَبْلَ صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ مَتَى يَقْضِيهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the one who misses the two Rak’ah before Fajr Prayer when should he make them up?

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الأَرْبَعِ رَكَعَاتٍ قَبْلَ الظُّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Four Rak’ah before the Zuhr

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ فَاتَتْهُ الأَرْبَعُ قَبْلَ الظُّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who misses the four Rak’ah before the Zuhr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ فَاتَتْهُ الرَّكْعَتَانِ بَعْدَ الظُّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who misses the two Rak’ah after the Zuhr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ صَلَّى قَبْلَ الظُّهْرِ أَرْبَعًا وَبَعْدَهَا أَرْبَعًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who performs four Rak’ah before the Zuhr and four Rak’ah afterwards

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ التَّطَوُّعِ بِالنَّهَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated about what is recommended of voluntary (Prayer) during the daytime

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ قَبْلَ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the two Rak’ah before the Maghrib

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ بَعْدَ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Concerning the two Rak’ah after the Maghrib

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقْرَأُ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ بَعْدَ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is to be recited in the two Rak’ah after the Maghrib

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السِّتِّ رَكَعَاتٍ بَعْدَ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the six Rak’ah after the Maghrib
Chapter: What was narrated concerning Witr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُقْرَأُ فِي الْوِتْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning what is to be recited in Witr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ بِرَكْعَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Praying one Rak’ah for Witr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُنُوتِ فِي الْوِتْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the Qunut in Witr

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَانَ لاَ يَرْفَعُ يَدَيْهِ فِي الْقُنُوتِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who does not raise his hands in Qunut

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَفَعَ يَدَيْهِ فِي الدُّعَاءِ وَمَسَحَ بِهِمَا وَجْهَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Raising the hands in supplication and wiping the face with them

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُنُوتِ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوعِ وَبَعْدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning reciting Qunut before Ruku’ or afterwards

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ آخِرَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Witr at the end of the night

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَامَ عَنْ وِتْرٍ، أَوْ نَسِيَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: One who sleeps and misses Witr, or forgets it

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ بِثَلاَثٍ وَخَمْسٍ وَسَبْعٍ وَتِسْعٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Witr with three, five, seven, or nine Rak’ah

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Witr when traveling

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ بَعْدَ الْوِتْرِ جَالِسًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the two Rak’ah sitting down after Witr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الضَّجْعَةِ بَعْدَ الْوِتْرِ وَبَعْدَ رَكْعَتَىِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning lying down after Witr and after the two Rak’ah of Fajr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ عَلَى الرَّاحِلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Witr while riding

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ أَوَّلَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Witr at the beginning of the night
Chapter: Forgetfulness during Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى الظُّهْرَ خَمْسًا وَهُوَ سَاهٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever performed the Zuhr with five Rak’ah because he forgot

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ قَامَ مِنَ اثْنَتَيْنِ سَاهِيًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who stands up after two Rak’ah by mistake

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ شَكَّ فِي صَلاَتِهِ فَرَجَعَ إِلَى الْيَقِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who is uncertain about his Prayer; let him refer to what is more certain

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ شَكَّ فِي صَلاَتِهِ فَتَحَرَّى الصَّوَابَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who is uncertain about his Prayer, so he should try to do what is correct

titles.arabic: باب فِيمَنْ سَلَّمَ مِنْ ثِنْتَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلاَثٍ سَاهِيًا
titles.english: Chapter: One who says the Salam after two or three Rak’ah by mistake

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي سَجْدَتَىِ السَّهْوِ قَبْلَ السَّلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Concerning the two prostration of forgetfulness before the Salam

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ سَجَدَهُمَا بَعْدَ السَّلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who does the prostration after the Salam

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْبِنَاءِ عَلَى الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning resuming the Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ أَحْدَثَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ كَيْفَ يَنْصَرِفُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning how to leave the prayer if one commits Hadath

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the Prayer of a sick person
Chapter: Voluntary prayer while sitting

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْقَاعِدِ عَلَى النِّصْفِ مِنْ صَلاَةِ الْقَائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prayer of the one who sits is equivalent to half of the Prayer of one who stands

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ فِي مَرَضِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What has been narrated concerning the Prayer of the Messenger of Allah (saws) during his sickness

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ خَلْفَ رَجُلٍ مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the Prayer of the Messenger of Allah (saws) performing Prayer behind a man from his Ummah

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي إِنَّمَا جُعِلَ الإِمَامُ لِيُؤْتَمَّ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the fact that the Imam is appointed to be followed

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُنُوتِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Qunut in the Fajr Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قَتْلِ الْحَيَّةِ وَالْعَقْرَبِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning killing snakes and scorpions during the Prayer

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الصَّلاَةِ، بَعْدَ الْفَجْرِ وَبَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of Prayer after the Fajr and the ‘Asr

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السَّاعَاتِ الَّتِي تُكْرَهُ فِيهَا الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the times when it is disliked to perform Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرُّخْصَةِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ بِمَكَّةَ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the concession allowing Prayer in Makkah at any time

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا إِذَا أَخَّرُوا الصَّلاَةَ عَنْ وَقْتِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning delaying the Prayer beyond its time

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْخَوْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the fear Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the eclipse Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the Prayer for rain

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الدُّعَاءِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning supplication for rain

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the ‘Eid Prayers

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَمْ يُكَبِّرُ الإِمَامُ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning how many times the Imam should say the Takbir in the Eid Prayers

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the recitation in the ‘Eid Prayers

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the sermon for ‘Eid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي انْتِظَارِ الْخُطْبَةِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning waiting for the sermon after the Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ قَبْلَ صَلاَةِ الْعِيدِ وَبَعْدَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Praying before or after the ‘Eid Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخُرُوجِ إِلَى الْعِيدِ مَاشِيًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning going out to the ‘Eid Prayer walking

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخُرُوجِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ مِنْ طَرِيقٍ وَالرُّجُوعِ مِنْ غَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning going out on the day of ‘Eid via one route and returning via another route

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّقْلِيسِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Taqlis on the day of ‘Eid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْحَرْبَةِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning carrying a spear on the day of ‘Eid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning women going out on the two ‘Eid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا إِذَا اجْتَمَعَ الْعِيدَانِ فِي يَوْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning two ‘Eid occurring on the same day

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ إِذَا كَانَ مَطَرٌ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated about the `Eid prayer being in the masjid when it is raining

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي لُبْسِ السِّلاَحِ فِي يَوْمِ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning wearing weapons on the day of ‘Eid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الاِغْتِسَالِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated about taking a bath on the two ‘Eid
Chapter: The time of the ‘Eid Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the (voluntary) night Prayer is two by two

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ مَثْنَى مَثْنَى
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning (voluntary) Prayers at night and during the day are two by two

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قِيامِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Qiyam (the voluntary night Prayers) during the month of Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning voluntary Prayers during the night

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ أَيْقَظَ أَهْلَهُ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who wakes up his family at night
Chapter: Making one’s voice beautiful when reciting Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ نَامَ عَنْ جُزْئِهِ، مِنَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who sleeps and misses his daily portion of the Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَمْ يُسْتَحَبُّ يُخْتَمُ الْقُرْآنُ
titles.english: Chapter: How much (time) is recommended regarding the completion of the Qur’an

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning recitation in the (voluntary) night Prayers

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا قَامَ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning supplication when a man stands to pray at night

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَمْ يُصَلِّي بِاللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning how many Rak’ah should be prayed at night

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَىِّ سَاعَاتِ اللَّيْلِ أَفْضَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning which hours of the night are best

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُرْجَى أَنْ يَكْفِيَ مِنْ قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated about what it is hoped will suffice for the night Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُصَلِّي إِذَا نَعَسَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated about if the person praying becomes sleepy

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ بَيْنَ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning praying between the Maghrib and ‘Isha’

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّطَوُّعِ فِي الْبَيْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning voluntary Prayers offered at home

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الضُّحَى
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Duha Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الاِسْتِخَارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Isthikhara Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْحَاجَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Prayer at times of need

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ التَّسْبِيحِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the Prayer of glorification

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي لَيْلَةِ النِّصْفِ مِنْ شَعْبَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the night of the middle of Sha’ban

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَالسَّجْدَةِ عِنْدَ الشُّكْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Prayer and prostration at times of gratitude

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَنَّ الصَّلاَةَ كَفَّارَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated saying that Prayer is an expiation

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَرْضِ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ وَالْمُحَافَظَةِ عَلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the five obligatory Prayers and performing them regularly

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ وَمَسْجِدِ النَّبِيِّ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the virtue of praying in the Sacred Mosque and the Mosque of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ بَيْتِ الْمَقْدِسِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning praying in the Mosque of Baitil-Maqdis (Jerusalem)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ قُبَاءٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Prayer in Quba’ Mosque

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْجَامِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning Prayer in the Jami’ Masjid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي بَدْءِ شَأْنِ الْمِنْبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the beginning of the construction of the pulpit

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي طُولِ الْقِيَامِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning standing for a long time in Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَثْرَةِ السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning prostrating a great deal

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَوَّلِ مَا يُحَاسَبُ بِهِ الْعَبْدُ الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: The first thing for which a person will be called to account will be his Prayers

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ النَّافِلَةِ حَيْثُ تُصَلَّى الْمَكْتُوبَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering a voluntary Prayer in the same place as one has offered an obligatory Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَوْطِينِ الْمَكَانِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ يُصَلِّي فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning having a place in the mosque in which one usually prays

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَيْنَ تُوضَعُ النَّعْلُ إِذَا خُلِعَتْ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning where shoes should be placed if they are taken off during Prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي عِيَادَةِ الْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning visiting the sick

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ثَوَابِ مَنْ عَادَ مَرِيضًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the reward of one who visits a sick person

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَلْقِينِ الْمَيِّتِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning urging the dying person to say La ilaha illallah

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْمَرِيضِ إِذَا حُضِرَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning what is to be said to the sick person when death approaches

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُؤْمِنِ يُؤْجَرُ فِي النَّزْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the believer being rewarded for the agony of death

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَغْمِيضِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning closing the eyes of the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَقْبِيلِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning kissing the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غُسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning washing the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غُسْلِ الرَّجُلِ امْرَأَتَهُ وَغُسْلِ الْمَرْأَةِ زَوْجَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning a man washing his wife and a woman washing her husband

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غُسْلِ النَّبِيِّ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the washing of the Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَفَنِ النَّبِيِّ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the shrouding of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الْكَفَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning what is recommended in shrouding

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّظَرِ إِلَى الْمَيِّتِ إِذَا أُدْرِجَ فِي أَكْفَانِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning looking at the deceased when he has been wrapped in his shroud

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنِ النَّعْىِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of making public death announcements

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي شُهُودِ الْجَنَائِزِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning attending funerals

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمَشْىِ أَمَامَ الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning walking ahead of the funeral (procession)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّسَلُّبِ، مَعَ الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of wearing mourning dress during the funeral procession

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْجِنَازَةِ لاَ تُؤَخَّرُ إِذَا حَضَرَتْ وَلاَ تُتْبَعُ بِنَارٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The funeral should not be delayed once the bier is ready, and the funeral procession should not be followed with fire

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ جَمَاعَةٌ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one for whom the funeral prayer is offered by a group of Muslims

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الثَّنَاءِ عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning praising the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَيْنَ يَقُومُ الإِمَامُ إِذَا صَلَّى عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Where should the Imam stand when he prays over the body?

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning recitation of Qur’an in the funeral prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الدُّعَاءِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning supplication during the funeral prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّكْبِيرِ عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ أَرْبَعًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning saying four takbir in the funeral prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ كَبَّرَ خَمْسًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who says the takbir five times

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الطِّفْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning offering the funeral prayer for a child

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى ابْنِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ وَذِكْرِ وَفَاتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the funeral prayer offered for the son of the Messenger of Allah (SAW) and the report of his death

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الشُّهَدَاءِ وَدَفْنِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the funeral prayer for the martyrs and their burial

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجَنَائِزِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning offering the funeral prayer in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الأَوْقَاتِ الَّتِي لاَ يُصَلَّى فِيهَا عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ وَلاَ يُدْفَنُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the times when the funeral prayer should not be offered and the deceased should not be buried

titles.arabic: باب فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Prayer for the people of the Qiblah

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْقَبْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering the funeral prayer at the grave

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى النَّجَاشِيِّ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prayers for Najashi

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ثَوَابِ مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَى جِنَازَةٍ وَمَنِ انْتَظَرَ دَفْنَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the reward for the one who offers the funeral prayer and the one who waits until the burial

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِيَامِ لِلْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning standing up for the funeral (procession)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُقَالُ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْمَقَابِرَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning what is to be said when entering the graveyard

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْجُلُوسِ فِي الْمَقَابِرِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning sitting in the graveyards

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي إِدْخَالِ الْمَيِّتِ الْقَبْرَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning placing the deceased in the grave

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي اسْتِحْبَابِ اللَّحْدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the niche-grave being recommended
Chapter: What was narrated concerning the ditch-grave

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي حَفْرِ الْقَبْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning digging the grave

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْعلَّامَةِ فِي الْقَبْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning markers on graves

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْبِنَاءِ، عَلَى الْقُبُورِ وَتَجْصِيصِهَا وَالْكِتَابَةِ عَلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of building over graves, plastering over them and writing on them

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي حَثْوِ التُّرَابِ فِي الْقَبْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning scattering earth in the grave

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمَشْىِ عَلَى الْقُبُورِ وَالْجُلُوسِ عَلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of walking or sitting on graves

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي خَلْعِ النَّعْلَيْنِ فِي الْمَقَابِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning taking off one’s shoes in the graveyard

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زِيَارَةِ الْقُبُورِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning visiting the graves

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زِيَارَةِ قُبُورِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning visiting the graves of the idolaters

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ النِّسَاءِ الْقُبُورَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of women visiting the graves

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي اتِّبَاعِ النِّسَاءِ الْجَنَائِزَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning women following the funeral (procession)
Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of wailing

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنْ ضَرْبِ الْخُدُودِ، وَشَقِّ الْجُيُوبِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of striking one’s cheeks and tearing one’s garment

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْبُكَاءِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning weeping for the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمَيِّتِ يُعَذَّبُ بِمَا نِيحَ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the deceased being punished for the wailing over him

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّبْرِ عَلَى الْمُصِيبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning bearing calamity with patience

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ثَوَابِ مَنْ عَزَّى مُصَابًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the reward for one who consoles a person afflicted by calamity

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ثَوَابِ مَنْ أُصِيبَ بِوَلَدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the reward of one who (loses) his child

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ أُصِيبَ بِسِقْطٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who suffers from a miscarriage

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الطَّعَامِ يُبْعَثُ إِلَى أَهْلِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the food that is sent to the family of the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنْ الاِجْتِمَاعِ، إِلَى أَهْلِ الْمَيِّتِ وَصُنْعَةِ الطَّعَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of gathering with the family of the deceased and preparing food

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ مَاتَ غَرِيبًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who dies in a strange land

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ مَاتَ مَرِيضًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who dies from a sickness

titles.arabic: باب فِي النَّهْىِ عَنْ كَسْرِ، عِظَامِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prohibition of breaking the bones of the deceased

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ذِكْرِ مَرَضِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the sickness of the Messenger of Allah (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ وَفَاتِهِ وَدَفْنِهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the death and burial of the Prophet (SAW)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ الصِّيَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the virtues of fasting

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the virtues of Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صِيَامِ يَوْمِ الشَّكِّ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning fasting on the day of doubt

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي وِصَالِ شَعْبَانَ بِرَمَضَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning joining Sha`ban to Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنْ أَنْ يَتَقَدَّمَ رَمَضَانَ بِصَوْمٍ إِلاَّ مَنْ صَامَ صَوْمًا فَوَافَقَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the prohibition of anticipating Ramadan by fasting before it, except for one who has a habitual pattern of fasting and it coincides with that

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الشَّهَادَةِ عَلَى رُؤْيَةِ الْهِلاَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the testimony that one has seen the crescent

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صُومُوا لِرُؤْيَتِهِ وَأَفْطِرُوا لِرُؤْيَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning: “Fast when you see it (the new crescent) and stop fasting when you see it”

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الشَّهْرُ تِسْعٌ وَعِشْرُونَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning: “The month is twenty-nine (days)”

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي شَهْرَىِ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the two months of Eid

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّوْمِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning fasting while traveling

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الإِفْطَارِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning not fasting while traveling

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الإِفْطَارِ لِلْحَامِلِ وَالْمُرْضِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning pregnant and nursing women breaking their fast

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قَضَاءِ رَمَضَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning making up for (fasts missed) during Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَفَّارَةِ مَنْ أَفْطَرَ يَوْمًا مِنْ رَمَضَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the expiation for one who breaks the fast in Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ أَفْطَرَ نَاسِيًا
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning one who breaks his fast out of forgetfulness

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّائِمِ يَقِيءُ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning a fasting person who vomits

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السِّوَاكِ وَالْكُحْلِ لِلصَّائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning the tooth stick and kohl for one who is fasting

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْحِجَامَةِ لِلصَّائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning cupping for one who is fasting

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُبْلَةِ لِلصَّائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: What was narrated concerning a fasting person kissing

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُبَاشَرَةِ لِلصَّائِمِ
